NAVAREA XIX 80/16
1. RIGLIST. CORRECT AT 290630 UTC JUL 16.
NORWEGIAN SEA: NORTH OF 65N, EAST OF 5W.
 
72-56.8N - 022-19.4E SCARABEO 8
72-01.2N - 020-31.5E LEIV EIRIKSSON
71-48.1N - 022-27.1E SONGA ENABLER
66-04.7N - 008-14.8E DEEPSEA BERGEN
65-01.0N - 006-56,7E SONGA ENCOURAGE

NOTES:
A. RIGS ARE PROTECTED BY A 500 METRE SAFETY ZONE.
B. FOR RIGS LOCATED SOUTH OF 65N, REFER TO NAVAREA I WARNINGS OR VISIT
WWW.UKHO.GOV.UK/RNW
2. CANCEL NAVAREA XIX 79/16
